prose: The Fukui reactivity analysis on aniline was performed using DFT with the B3LYP functional and the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The calculation used charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The method used was explicitly specified in the computation as DFT with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis. The results include the most electrophilic and nucleophilic atoms, their associated Fukui indices, and a plot of the reactivity distribution. Warnings indicate charge conservation drift during the calculation but do not compromise trustworthiness. The computation was conducted with the chemkit tool, ensuring transparency and reproducibility.
